SELECT id,
    created_at,
    name,
    event_name,
    price_category,
    location_data,
    event_date,
    event_time_utc,
    relevant_links,
    description,
    photos,
    representative_emoji,
    hex_color,
    is_approved,
    user_id,
    zip_code,

          WHERE (event_attendance.event_id = events.id)) AS attendance_count

Security_Policies: NO RLS / PUBLIC OR VIEW
Full_View_Definition:
SELECT p.id,
    p.user_id,
    p.content,
    p.image_url,
    p.zip_code,
    p.borough,
    p.is_participant,
    p.post_approved,
    p.created_at,
    p.post_fill,
    p.post_outline,
    p.scope,
    p.post_shadow,
    pr.username,
    COALESCE(rx.total_reactions, (0)::bigint) AS total_reactions,
    COALESCE(cm.total_comments, (0)::bigint) AS total_comments
   FROM (((geoposts p
     LEFT JOIN profiles pr ON ((p.user_id = pr.id)))
     LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_reactions.post_id,
            count(*) AS total_reactions
           FROM post_reactions
          GROUP BY post_reactions.post_id) rx ON ((p.id = rx.post_id)))
     LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_comments.post_id,
            count(*) AS total_comments
           FROM post_comments
          GROUP BY post_comments.post_id) cm ON ((p.id = cm.post_id)));
